items.caption: A glass coffee mug with a handle on the right side, filled with a brown liquid that resembles coffee. the mug has a quote printed on it in white cursive font that reads, "you are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think." the background is a plain, light color, providing a neutral backdrop that highlights the mug and its message. the mug appears to be made of clear glass, allowing the contents to be visible. the text is centered on the mug and is the focal point of the image. the style of the image is straightforward and promotional, likely intended for advertising the mug as a gift item.
